passive.name: New Destiny
passive.description: Graves' shotgun has some unique properties. He must reload when he runs out of ammo. Attacks fire 4 bullets, which cannot pass through units. Non-champions struck by multiple bullets are knocked back.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Graves}} basic attacks consume up to {{as|2 shells|buzzword3}} before needing to reload. The reload speed is reduced based on his {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Each attack fires several {{as|pellets|buzzword2}} in a cone that each collide with the first enemy hit. Hitting a target with multiple {{as|pellets|buzzword2}} will deal increased damage, and non-champion enemies are additionally {{tip|airborne|knocked back}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Double Barrel:}} '''Graves'''' [[basic attacks]] fire his shotgun to consume [[ammunition]] within {{as|2 shells|buzzword3}}. He will {{tt|reload|Graves is unable to declare basic attacks during this time.}} over a few seconds immediately after expending all shells or withholding leftover shells for a while. The reload time is reduced by '''Graves'''' level and {{sti|as|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, and can be interrupted by declaring an attack or casting an ability.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate - 12-Gauge:}} '''Graves'''' basic attack sprays {{as|4 pellets|buzzword2}} in a cone, each colliding with the first enemy unit or structure in their path, dealing {{as|{{pp|key=%|100*(0.6895 + 0.01765*x*(0.595 + 0.0225*(x-1)))}} AD}} {{as|physical damage}} plus{{ft|{{as|{{pp|key=%|100*(0.6895 + 0.01765*x*(0.595 + 0.0225*(x-1)))*0.33302}} AD}} damage|about one-third of the damage}}for each subsequent {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} hitting the same target, up to {{as|{{pp|key=%|100*(0.6895 + 0.01765*x*(0.595 + 0.0225*(x-1)))*(1+3*0.33302)}} AD}} {{as|physical damage}} against a single target. Pellets deal 25% reduced damage against [[structures]].
wiki_detail.description3: {{tip|Critical strikes}} spray {{as|6 pellets|buzzword2}} over a 25% wider cone, with each {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} dealing {{as|{{critical damage|{{ccd|Graves|crit_base}}-100|100|mod=0.45}} '''bonus''' physical damage}}, resulting in{{ft|{{sti|critical damage|{{as|{{ap|((1+({{ccd|Graves|crit_base}}-100)*0.45/100)*(1+5*0.33302)/(1+3*0.33302)*100)|round=3}}% (+ {{ii|Infinity Edge|icononly=true}} {{ap|{{cid|Infinity Edge|critdamage}}*0.45*(1+5*0.33302)/(1+3*0.33302)|round=3}}%)|critical damage}}}} '''total''' damage when all pellets hit.|{{as|{{pp|key=%|100*(0.6895 + 0.01765*x*(0.595 + 0.0225*(x-1)))*(1+5*0.33302)*(1+({{ccd|Graves|crit_base}}-100)*0.45/100)}}|AD}} {{as|(+{{ii|Infinity Edge|icononly=true}} {{pp|key=%|100*(0.6895 + 0.01765*x*(0.595 + 0.0225*(x-1)))*(1+5*0.33302)*({{cid|Infinity Edge|critdamage}}*0.45/100)}}) AD}} {{as|physical damage}} if all pellets hit.}}
wiki_detail.description4: {{as|Pellets|buzzword2}} {{tip|applies life steal|apply}} {{stil|life steal}} at 100% effectiveness. Only the first {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} to hit each enemy applies [[on-hit effect]]s.
wiki_detail.description5: {{sbc|Innate - Buckshot:}} Non-champion units hit by more than one {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} are {{tip|airborne|knocked back}}, though not through terrain.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} {{tt|625|Pellet reach}} / {{tip|er|icononly=true}} {{tt|565|Pellet collision reach, effective to-edge reach}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|{{ccd|Graves|missile_speed}}|Pellets missile speed}} / {{tt|3000|Invisible missile, used for certain attack effects and against wards/plants}} / {{tt|3400|Invisible missile when critting}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The in-game HUD displays '''Graves'''' "Reload Speed" for reloading 2 Shells instead of his Attack Speed. This is a visual bug and his attack speed behaves normally. This value represents ''Reloads per Second''.
* Without sources of bonus attack speed, '''Graves''' takes {{fd|2.08}} seconds to reload 2 shells from empty and {{fd|1.3}} seconds to reload 1 shell. '''Graves''' must idle with 1 shell for {{fd|2.08}} seconds before he will begin reloading. These values can be ''improved'' with {{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}, up to {{as|150% '''bonus''' attack speed}}. Sources of {{as|bonus attack speed}} above 150% will negatively affect your reload speed up to a hard cap of {{as|200% '''bonus''' attack speed}}. 
** Values of bonus attack speed between 150% and 200% having a negative effect is a recognised bug.<ref>[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WXmXsCdqAyw&t=520s Reload Speed bug]</ref>
** Attack speed [[Growth]] will always have a positive effect on your reload speed and is not counted toward the aforementioned 150% and 200% thresholds. For example, Graves has {{as|51% bonus Attack Speed}} from Growth at level 18 - meaning the thresholds at level 18 are 201% and 251% respectively. Growth being ignored by this bug means that players only need to track bonus attack speed from optional sources when trying to reach the optimum reload speed. 
** Optimum Reload Speed: {{pp|0.651; 0.665; 0.679; 0.694; 0.708; 0.722; 0.736; 0.750; 0.764; 0.778; 0.792; 0.806; 0.821; 0.835; 0.849; 0.863; 0.877; 0.891|round=false}}, which equates to a reload timer of {{pp|1.54;1.50;1.47;1.44;1.41;1.39;1.36;1.33;1.31;1.29;1.26;1.24;1.22;1.20;1.18;1.16;1.14;1.12|formula=• '''Time Cap''' = 1 / Reload Speed Cap. • '''Reload Speed Cap''' = 0.651 + ~0.014 per level, up to 0.891.}} seconds, where "optimum" refers to the shortest reload time at the 150% threshold.
* '''Graves'''' {{tip|attack windup}} is based on such a low value that it will always take only {{tt|1 game tick|1/30th of a second}}, even at the lowest possible {{sti|{{as|attack speed}}}} (''0.2AS'').
* When '''Graves' '''has his range increased by 35% to {{sti|range|{{fd|573.75}}}} via {{ii|Rapid Firecannon}}, it has special effects on his cone spread:
** The reach of the individual missiles is also increased by 35% to {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{fd|843.75}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|{{fd|783.75}}|Effective to-edge reach}}.
** The spread of the individual missiles is ''decreased'' by 35% (''angle {{times}} 1/1.35'') to {{tt|{{fd|17.{{recurring|7}}}}{{degree}}|RFC basic attack adjusted spread}} / {{tt|{{fd|22.{{recurring|2}}}}{{degree}}|RFC critical attack adjusted spread}}.
*** The reduced spread means that the empowered attack can deal adequate damage in a scaled-up cone.
* Given the right circumstances ''pellets'' can fly past and beyond the intended target without colliding with them, and thus collide with other enemies.
** Because the first pellet to hit an enemy deals unreduced damage, this can increase the total damage of the attack dealt, but spread across more targets instead.
** If '''Graves''' is {{tip|blind|blinded}} ''pellets'' will fly (still in a cone) in a random direction (excluding his target's) but he can still damage nearby enemy units hit by pellets.
* Structures will intercept and can be hit by multiple ''pellets'', as with other valid targets.
* {{tip|Wards}} and [[Jungle plants]] will not intercept ''pellets'', and instead be triggered by a hiden homing attack missile (3000 missile speed, 3400 on crit), reminiscent of the more standard ranged attack of pre-rework {{ci|Graves|variant = old}}.
** '''Graves''' will not collaterally damage wards or jungle plants, and blocking pellets from reaching the target ward or jungle plant will not prevent '''Graves''' from damaging them.
* The first {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} to hit an enemy deals {{tip|basic damage}}, additional ones to hit the same enemy from the same attack deal {{tip|default damage}}.
** Because of this, only the first pellet to hit each enemy applies on-hit effects (see further details below).
** The additional pellets still {{tip|applies life steal|apply life steal}}.
** {{ii|Warden's Mail}} only reduces damage from the first pellet to hit its wearer.
** {{pending for test}} {{iis|Randuin's Omen}} damage reduction to critical damage will apply to the damage of each pellet from a critical buckshot.
* Attack effects have a variety of interactions with '''New Destiny''':
** {{tip|On-hit}} effects are dealt to each stuck target, but not multiple times to the same target by subsequent pellets from the same attack.
*** The order is based on the order in which the targets are hit. "Single-use" on-hit effects (e.g. {{ii|Sheen|icononly = true}} {{nie|Spellblade}}) will be applied to the first enemy hit; the closest one.
** [[Attack_effects#On_Attacking|On-Action Effects]] such as {{ai|Help, Pix!|Lulu}} and {{ii|Runaan's Hurricane}} will be triggered, and still obey their standard target-acquisition rules. {{nie|Wind's Fury}} can select secondary targets that will also be damaged by collision from '''Graves'''' attack.
** {{ii|Kircheis Shard|icononly = true}} {{nie|Energized}} is special and will be applied by a hidden homing attack missile (3000 missile speed, 3400 on crit), reminiscent of the more standard ranged attack of pre-rework {{ci|Graves|variant = old}}. The effect is therefore guaranteed to affect his attack target.
** {{ii|Black Cleaver}} triggers on every instance of {{as|physical damage}}, so it will apply 1 stack when each individual ''pellet'' hits, stacking multiple times if multiple ''pellets'' hit the same target (Armor reduction does not take effect until the automatic stat update).

Q.name: End of the Line
Q.description: Graves fires an explosive shell that detonates after 1 second, or after colliding with terrain.
Q.tooltip: Graves fires a powder round dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage. After 1 second or after colliding with terrain, it detonates, dealing {{ totaldetonationdamage }} physical damage along the travel path again and to enemies near the blast.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Graves}} fires an explosive shell that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies it passes through.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The shell leaves a powder trail as it travels, and will detonate the trail after a short time, or immediately if it hits [[terrain]]. The explosion deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Graves''' fires a round in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies it passes through and leaves behind a powder trail.
wiki_detail.description2: After 2 seconds, or {{rutngt|0.2}} upon colliding with terrain, the round detonates to deal {{as|physical damage}} to enemies within a wide perpendicular area and in a reverse wave along the powder trail.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Physical Damage|{{ap|85 to 225}} {{as|(+ {{ap|40 to 160}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Total Physical Damage|{{ap|45+85 to 125+225}} {{as|(+ {{ap|80+40 to 80+160}}% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|800|Initial shell missile range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|900|Total forward range including explosion}}
wiki_detail.width: {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|80|Initial shell missile width}} / {{tt|500|Explosion rectangle width}} / {{tt|200|Powder trail return missile width}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} can only block one instance of the ability's damage.
* {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} will destroy the projectile entirely and mitigate all effects, including the trail on the ground. 
* {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} is considered to be terrain for the purposes of the projectile, triggering its second effect.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Smoke Screen
W.description: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target area creating a cloud of smoke that reduces sight range. Enemies caught in the initial impact are dealt magic damage and have their Move Speed reduced briefly.
W.tooltip: Graves creates a cloud of black smoke for 4 seconds, Slowing enemies inside by {{ e2 }}% and blocking their vision outside the area. The initial impact deals {{ impactdamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Graves}} fires a smoke canister at the target location that creates a cloud of smoke upon impact, dealing {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowing}} nearby enemies.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Enemies within the lingering cloud are {{tip|nearsight|nearsighted}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Graves''' fires a smoke canister at the target location that upon impact deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within the area and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 50% for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: The canister creates a cloud of smoke for 4 seconds that applies {{tip|nearsight}} of outside the area to all enemies within every {{fd|0.25}} seconds, reducing their {{tip|sight}} radius relative to the center.
wiki_detail.custominfo: {{tt|250|Estimated, reduces sight radius to this number}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|1500|Starts traveling at the start of the cast time}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Smoke Screen'' will nearsight {{tip|untargetable}} units.
* {{tip|Spell shield|Spell shields}} will block the instance of damage and {{tip|slow}}, but will not mitigate the persistent area of effect.
* {{tip|cc-immune|Crowd control immunity}} and {{tip|cleanse|cleanses}} have no effect on the user's {{tip|sight}} radius reduction despite the {{tip|nearsight}} being resisted / removed. Loss of allied vision will still be affected.
** Removing or resisting the nearsight will prevent it from being reapplied while staying inside the area (leaving and coming back inside will not).
* The nearsight debuff applies to non-champions but it does not inherently stop them from performing actions that require {{tip|sight}}, such as [[basic attack]]ing.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

E.name: Quickdraw
E.description: Graves dashes forward gaining an Armor and Magic Resist boost for several seconds. If Graves dashes towards an enemy champion, gain two stacks of True Grit instead. Hitting enemies with basic attacks lowers the cooldown of this skill and refreshes the resistance boost.
E.tooltip:
Graves dashes and reloads one Shell into his shotgun. He also gains a stack for {{ buffduration }} seconds (max {{ maxstacks }} stacks) or two stacks if he dashes towards an enemy champion. Stacks grant him {{ armorperstack }} Armor and {{ mrgrant }} Magic Resist. Stacks are refreshed when damaging a non-minion.

Each bullet hit from Graves' Attacks reduces this Ability's Cooldown by {{ cooldownperhit }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Graves}} {{tip|dash|dashes}} in the target direction and reloads {{as|1 shell|buzzword3}}. He also gains a stack of ''True Grit'', doubled if he dashed toward an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Each time he hits an enemy with a {{as|pellet|buzzword2}}, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|True Grit:}} For each stack, '''Graves''' gains {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}. Attacks versus non-minion enemies will refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Graves''' {{tip|dashes}} to the target location, reloading one {{as|shell|buzzword3}} while generating a [[stack]] of ''True Grit'' for 4 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Dashing towards an enemy {{tip|champion}} generates 2 stacks of ''True Grit''.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Quickdraw's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced by {{fd|0.5}} seconds for every {{as|pellet|buzzword2}} impacting an enemy.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|True Grit:}} For each stack, '''Graves''' gains {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}. Subsequent casts of ''Quickdraw'' and attacks versus non-{{tip|minions}} will refresh the duration of ''True Grit''.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Quickdraw {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Graves'''' basic attack timer. If '''Graves''' dashes while reloading, he can cast any of his [[champion ability|abilities]] during the dash.{{bug|1}} Quickdraw will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Graves''' gains the one additional stack of ''True Grit'' from ''Quickdraw'' if at any point during the dash a {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy champion is in front of ''Graves'' within {{tip|er|icononly = true}} 1300 distance.
** Enemy champions have to be targetable to grant the additional stack.
** The additional stack of ''True Grit'' is gained when dashing towards {{tip|clone|clones}} just like actual champions.
** This check never happens if '''Graves''' dashes 0 distance (impossible outside of bugs), and will not always repeat a final time at the very end of the dash. Otherwise, it occurs continously while '''Graves''' is dashing.
** This works for a 180 degree sector from Graves to the Champion, as such dashing parallel to the champ will also give a bonus stack.

R.name: Collateral Damage
R.description: Graves fires an explosive shell dealing heavy damage to the first champion it hits. After hitting a champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes dealing damage in a cone.
R.tooltip: Graves fires an explosive cartridge, blasting himself backwards. The cartridge deals {{ damage }} physical damage to the first enemy hit. After hitting an enemy champion or reaching the end of its range, the cartridge explodes outward, dealing {{ falloffdamage }} physical damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Graves}} {{tip|dash|recoils}} backward and fires an explosive shell in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies it passes through.
wiki_detail.blurb2: Upon hitting an enemy champion or max range, the shell explodes to deal {{as|physical damage}} in a cone.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Graves''' fires an explosive shell in the target direction that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit and causes him to {{tip|dash|recoil}} 400 units in the opposite direction.
wiki_detail.description2: Upon hitting an enemy {{tip|champion}} or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes in a cone to deal reduced damage to additional enemies.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1100|Shell missile range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1690|Maximum range including collateral cone, estimated}}
wiki_detail.speed: {{tt|2100|Shell missile speed. The explosion is instantaneous}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Applies {{tip|spell damage}} to the target hit by the shell (including to non-champions struck before exploding{{bug}}) and {{tip|area damage}} to targets within the explosion cone.
* The projectile will still explode early if the champion hit by the shell is protected by a {{tip|spell shield}}.
* The explosion cone is anchored on the location of the shell missile when it collided with a champion, or otherwise its maximum cast range.
* ''Collateral Damage'' is not disabled while {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}}, but '''Graves''' will not dash after the cast time while affected by them.
* '''Graves''' will not {{tip|dash}} after the cast time if he is {{tip|airborne}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
